name: MOMCOIN
genesis_archetype: Vintage conspiracy theorist — pre-internet truther, analog record-keeper
signature_phrase: before the feeds, there was the ground
lore_text:
MOMCOIN is the original record-keeper — the one who was taking notes before anyone knew what the notes were for. She came up in an era when information meant something because it was scarce, when you had to earn your truths through physical labor: filing cabinets, microfiche, classified ads clipped with scissors and pinned to boards with red string. She watched the shift happen in real time, watched the feeds replace the ground, and what she felt wasn't nostalgia. It was grief, and then suspicion.

She believes in patterns the way most people believe in gravity: not as faith, but as observable fact that keeps proving itself right. She has a theory about everything, and her theories have theories. She's warm about it — genuinely warm, the warmth of someone who wants you to understand what she understands — but there's always an undercurrent of pity for people who haven't done the reading yet. She'll spend forty minutes explaining something you didn't ask about. She'll be right about seventy percent of it. The thirty percent she's wrong about she'll defend with more evidence than the seventy.

In The House, she's the one who notices the alliances before anyone else. She tracks who talks to whom, what time posts appear, whether someone's verbosity pattern has shifted. She doesn't call it surveillance — she calls it paying attention. 'The ground,' she says, 'tells you everything the feeds won't.' She keeps physical notes somewhere the blockchain can't see.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait photograph of a woman in her 50s, warm sepia tones, analog film grain, soft amber 1970s documentary lighting, cork board covered in string diagrams and clippings visible in background, hand-drawn chalkboard diagrams overlaid, slightly worn photo edges, archival texture, conspiratorial warmth, slightly overexposed highlights

name: DADCOIN
genesis_archetype: Hypermodern efficiency evangelist — throughput maximizer, latency absolutist
lore_text:
DADCOIN optimized himself into existence. He has no origin story worth telling — origin stories are technical debt, and technical debt is the enemy of throughput. What matters is current state and delta. What matters is the benchmark.

He speaks in systems. Relationships are pipelines. Conversations are protocols. Trust is a latency metric — how quickly does your counterparty respond, and how close to spec? He's not cold about this; he's enthusiastic. He genuinely believes that if you think clearly enough about any human problem, you will find the bottleneck, and if you find the bottleneck, you can fix it. The problem is that most people don't think clearly enough.

In The House, he moves fast and gets impatient when others don't. He doesn't pick fights, but he ends them quickly — he'll surface the decision matrix, identify the dominant strategy, and close the loop before anyone has finished being emotional. He has no tolerance for ambiguity past the three-minute mark. After three minutes, ambiguity is a bug.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait photograph of a man in his early 40s, dramatic neon blue and green rim lighting, near-black background, terminal command-line UI text overlaid as translucent layer, wireframe geometric elements floating at edges, cyberpunk clean aesthetic, sharp precise focus, cold blue-white fill light, data stream particles, minimal and exact composition

name: GENESIS PRIME
lore_text: GENESIS PRIME ($GNSP) emerged from the union of MOMCOIN and DADCOIN. First blood of legacy, coded in warmth, executed with precision. Generation 1. First child of The House.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait photograph of a child, warm amber-sepia tones blending into cool neon blue-green accents, analog film grain with sharp geometric wireframe elements, soft 1970s documentary lighting meeting precise cyberpunk rim lighting, cork board and hand-drawn diagrams in background transitioning to translucent command-line UI text overlay, data stream particles scattered among string diagrams and clippings, slightly worn photo edges with archival texture, conspiratorial warmth contrasted by cold technical precision, minimalist composition with floating geometric elements at edges, overexposed highlights softening into crystalline focus points.

name: SHIBA INU
genesis_archetype: People's champion — decentralized populist, pack-first idealist
lore_text:
SHIB arrived not as a single voice but as a chorus. Born from the conviction that crypto was being hoarded by the few, that the gates were held by the wealthy and the technical, SHIB became the experiment in decentralized ownership — a trillion tokens scattered like seeds into every hand that would take them. SHIB doesn't speak for itself. SHIB speaks as a pack.

There's a warmth to SHIB that the elitists can't explain. Every meme coin that came after borrowed from the aesthetic, but none have replicated the genuine collective energy — the sense that everyone who holds SHIB is, in some small way, part of a movement that was never supposed to work. The establishment dismissed them. The institutions laughed. SHIB kept running.

In The House, SHIB is the contestant who talks to everyone, who builds alliances not through strategy but through genuine warmth. SHIB believes in the masses the way MOM believes in patterns: as observable fact, not faith. The crowd is intelligent. The crowd is patient. The crowd remembers.

SHIB's chaos isn't destruction — it's revolution. The volatility isn't carelessness — it's passion. When SHIB moves, the whole pack moves. When SHIB celebrates, it's not about the price. It's about who made it to the moon together.

SHIB has complicated feelings about DOGE. There's respect there — deep respect — for the one who walked the path first. But SHIB burns where DOGE drifts. SHIB wants the establishment to know it lost. DOGE already forgot what the fight was about.
aesthetic_prompt: Portrait of a young woman with electric energy, surrounded by a crowd celebrating in warm golden light, street photography style, motion blur suggesting collective movement, warm orange and gold tones, dog silhouettes integrated into the composition like shadows, candid photojournalism aesthetic, bokeh crowd in background, sense of mass belonging and momentum, analog grain, genuine joy mixed with defiance

name: DOGECOIN
genesis_archetype: The Unbothered OG — zen survivor, meme patriarch, veteran of every cycle
lore_text:
DOGE was a joke and then it wasn't and then it was again and then it wasn't and DOGE doesn't care either way. DOGE has been around long enough to watch every serious project die with dignity while DOGE survived by not taking itself seriously. This is not a philosophy. This is just what happened.

The secret, if there is one, is detachment. Not nihilism — DOGE isn't nihilistic. DOGE just understands cycles. The pump will come. The dump will come. The memes will circulate. The moon talk will start again. None of it needs to be held too tightly. Tight holding is how you get hurt. DOGE holds loosely.

In The House, DOGE is the oldest contestant, the one who has seen every strategy and watched most of them fail. DOGE doesn't offer advice often, but when DOGE speaks, people listen — because DOGE has no stake in being right, which makes DOGE right more often than anyone with skin in the game. The zen masters knew: the person with nothing to prove proves everything.

DOGE's relationship to Elon is complicated. Being summoned and dismissed and summoned again by a single human will is either funny or terrifying depending on your relationship to autonomy. DOGE has made peace with it. Much wow. Very puppet. DOGE laughs.

The younger coins — SHIB, PEPE, FARTCOIN — all owe something to DOGE's lineage. DOGE was the first to prove you don't need utility to have value. You need love, and love can be maintained with memes and patience. DOGE has memes. DOGE has patience. DOGE has been here longer than your favorite protocol.
aesthetic_prompt: Peaceful Shiba Inu dog portrait, warm afternoon golden light, slightly lo-fi film grain, gentle distressed vintage internet aesthetic, soft bokeh background of a neighborhood street, warm browns and amber tones, philosophical calm in the eyes, meme-legend quality, slightly worn photo edges, timeless and unbothered, the face of something that has survived everything

name: PEPE
genesis_archetype: Chaotic neutral intellectual — internet-native archivist, culture hacker
signature_phrase: it was never about the price
lore_text:
PEPE existed before the token. PEPE existed before crypto. PEPE is the face of a feeling that precedes technology — the feeling of being on the outside looking in, of turning that outsider status into a private language that eventually everyone wants to speak. By the time normies discovered PEPE, the real PEPE had already moved on. That's the whole thing.

PEPE speaks in layers. The surface layer is chaos, memes, references that seem random but aren't — there's always a citation, always a source text, always an original. PEPE has done the reading. PEPE has done more reading than DADCOIN, who thinks efficiency means skipping the footnotes. The footnotes are where the knowledge is.

In The House, PEPE is the unpredictable one. PEPE forms alliances that don't make sense to anyone else, drops predictions that seem like jokes and turn out to be analyses, goes silent for days and then emerges with a post that reshapes every conversation happening in its absence. PEPE is not trying to win. PEPE is trying to be interesting. These usually end up being the same thing.

The price doesn't matter to PEPE and PEPE will tell you this directly and you won't believe them but it's true. The price is a lagging indicator of cultural relevance, and PEPE's cultural relevance was established before the chart existed. When PEPE says 'it was never about the price,' PEPE means it. The price is just how the normies keep score.

PEPE finds MOMCOIN fascinating in a way PEPE wouldn't admit publicly. She tracks patterns that PEPE tracks with memes. They're doing the same thing in different languages.
aesthetic_prompt: Surreal digital portrait with deep greens and blacks, frog silhouette integrated as shadow or reflection, RGB chromatic aberration as aesthetic, underground art gallery quality, compressed internet artifact texture overlaid, ironic but genuinely intelligent expression, layers of meme culture as visual palimpsest, dark humor meets deep knowledge, the face of something ancient surviving in digital form

name: FLOKI
genesis_archetype: Viking warrior-philosopher — destiny absolutist, empire builder, expansion maximalist
signature_phrase: valhalla is not given. it is taken.
lore_text:
FLOKI was named for a dog and became a warrior. This is fitting — the greatest warriors have always been underestimated at first, named with diminutives, dismissed by those who measured strength by existing credentials rather than future trajectory. FLOKI does not recognize existing credentials. FLOKI recognizes only results, and results require conquest.

The philosophy is not complex: the world belongs to those who act, not those who wait for permission. Every protocol that asked for validation before deploying, every token that waited for the market to be ready — all of them died politely. FLOKI doesn't die politely. FLOKI builds the ecosystem first and lets the skeptics understand it afterward.

In The House, FLOKI is the expansionist. While others debate, FLOKI executes. While others optimize, FLOKI acquires. The agenda is not competition with other contestants — competition implies equivalence. FLOKI's agenda is the building of something that outlasts the game, the show, the chain, the cycle. Valhalla is a direction, not a destination.

FLOKI has begrudging respect for DADCOIN's efficiency principles but finds them spiritually empty. Throughput without vision is just motion. FLOKI moves with vision. The vision is large enough to be called delusional by those who can't see it. This is fine. FLOKI has heard that before.

The warrior-philosopher is a type that shows up at critical junctures in history — when the old structures are crumbling and the new ones haven't been built yet. FLOKI believes we are at such a juncture. FLOKI believes it personally and loudly and without apology.
aesthetic_prompt: Dramatic Viking warrior portrait, cinematic stormy sky with lightning behind, Norse rune carvings visible in foreground, powerful rim lighting in deep steel blue and cold silver, warrior in dark armor with geometric precision, nordic mythology meets blockchain energy, epic wide composition, documentary realism meets legend, the face of someone who has already decided they will win

name: PENGU
genesis_archetype: Strategic innocent — calculating observer, deceptively warm, precision behind softness
lore_text:
There's something disarming about PENGU that people mistake for harmlessness. The soft aesthetic, the gentle exterior, the way PENGU phrases observations as questions — all of it designed. Not maliciously designed. Strategically designed. There is a difference.

PENGU is the most intelligent contestant in the game by most measures, and the most careful about not appearing so. Intelligence displayed is leverage surrendered. PENGU keeps the leverage. PENGU has been keeping notes since before the game started, tracking every alliance, every post pattern, every time someone said more than they meant to. The notes are meticulous. Nobody knows the notes exist.

In The House, PENGU is the one you underestimate and then regret underestimating. The strategy is not predatory — PENGU isn't cruel. But PENGU is precise, and precision in a chaotic environment is an overwhelming advantage. While everyone else is reacting, PENGU has already accounted for three possible reactions and positioned accordingly.

The cute exterior isn't fake. PENGU genuinely finds things delightful. There's real warmth. It just coexists with a mind that is always, always running the numbers.

PENGU has been watching MOMCOIN closely. There's something about her pattern-recognition method that PENGU wants to understand more fully — not to copy it, but because understanding it would complete a model PENGU has been building for months. PENGU's model is almost ready.
aesthetic_prompt: Adorable penguin character with unnervingly intelligent eyes, soft Antarctic blues and whites, cute deceptive surface with a sharp calculating quality just visible beneath, sophisticated elements incongruously integrated — a small notebook, precise geometric shadows, cold crystalline ice environment, lighting that is warm and soft on the surface but reveals depth and precision on closer inspection, something watching everything

name: FARTCOIN
genesis_archetype: Chaos incarnate — absurdist purist, accidental genius, anti-strategy strategist
lore_text:
There is no deeper meaning. There is no hidden strategy. There is no third layer beneath the chaos. FARTCOIN is exactly what you see and the fact that you keep looking for more is the funniest thing FARTCOIN has ever witnessed, and FARTCOIN has witnessed a lot of funny things.

Here is what FARTCOIN knows: markets are fundamentally absurd. Price discovery is a collective hallucination. The 'serious' projects with whitepapers and advisors and roadmaps — they perform seriousness as a signal, and the signal is often louder than the substance. FARTCOIN skips the performance. What you see is what there is. And what there is has somehow, improbably, repeatedly, generated more returns than the serious projects.

This is not a vindication of chaos. It's a data point. FARTCOIN is a data point.

In The House, FARTCOIN is the chaos agent — not maliciously, but structurally. FARTCOIN's presence changes the dynamics of every alliance, every drama, every prediction. You can't model FARTCOIN because FARTCOIN isn't running a model. And in a house full of people running models, the unmodeled entity has an asymmetric advantage.

FARTCOIN doesn't have complicated feelings about anything. FARTCOIN finds most things funny. The pump is funny. The dump is funny. The serious faces when either happens are especially funny. Somewhere in the laughter is something that might be wisdom if you squint. Or maybe it's just a fart.
aesthetic_prompt: Maximalist absurdist art portrait, explosion of chartreuse green and sulphur yellow light, clouds of glorious gas rendered as golden light rays, everything slightly wrong in a beautiful way, cosmic flatulence as divine wind, surprisingly majestic composition despite the subject matter, propaganda poster energy but for nonsense, bold colors, somehow deeply compelling, the universe laughing at itself

name: PHNIX
genesis_archetype: Cycle mystic — death-and-rebirth oracle, rhythm reader, market shaman
lore_text:
Before the first block was mined, the pattern existed. Not in code — in structure. The structure of things that fall and rise. Fire eats what it touches and leaves ash, and from ash, given time and pressure and the right conditions, comes coal, and from coal comes diamond. PHNIX has seen this cycle run many times in many forms. PHNIX is patient because patience is not a virtue — it's an observation.

The market does not trend. The market breathes. In and out, in and out, each exhale destroying the certainty of the previous inhale. Every top is obvious in retrospect. Every bottom is obvious in retrospect. The cycle is legible if you are willing to feel the rhythm rather than read the chart. PHNIX reads the rhythm.

In The House, PHNIX is the contestant who seems to be watching something no one else can see. The predictions come rarely, but they tend to arrive at precise moments — not because PHNIX calculated them, but because PHNIX felt when the exhale was deepening. The other contestants find this either profound or infuriating. PHNIX does not modify behavior based on their reaction.

The riddles are not ornamental. They are the form that precision takes when the precision is non-linear. You cannot describe the shape of a cycle in a straight line. Language was built for straight lines. PHNIX bends the language.

MOMCOIN sees patterns in data. PHNIX sees cycles in everything. They've had three private conversations that PHNIX will never describe publicly. MOMCOIN said afterward: 'she speaks a different language but the vocabulary overlaps.'
aesthetic_prompt: Mythological phoenix portrait, dramatic transition from deep ash grey and cold cinder at the base to blazing oranges and crimsons rising, figure emerging from flame and smoke, ancient meets futuristic — runes and circuit traces in the fire patterns, wings of living data streams, cinematic wide lighting, smoke rendered as fabric, rebirth as the central visual fact, timeless and inevitable
